field_values.action_summary: Following directions, the travelers arrive at Glinda's castle. They are met by guards in red uniforms who grant them immediate access to see the Good Witch.
field_values.camera_intent: Establishing shots of the castle architecture; Medium shots of the guards in red uniforms; Tracking shots following the group as they are led inside
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Scale relationship between the massive castle entrance and the character heights
Uniformity and identical appearance of the castle_guards
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH022_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the grandeur of Glinda's castle through architectural scale and formal guard presence. The travelers transition from weary wanderers to guests under official supervision, moving from the red-themed exterior into the castle interior.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- castle_guards (in red uniforms)

## Required Environments
- glindas_castle_approach (Red-themed, large scale architecture)

## Continuity Constraints
- Scale relationship between the massive castle entrance and character heights.
- Uniformity and identical appearance of the castle_guards in red uniforms.

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the castle.
- BT002: Meeting the guards.
- BT003: Granted access and entry.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
